title: HGV Driver
overview: HGV Drivers transport goods across local, national, or international routes using heavy goods vehicles. They ensure safe loading, secure transport, and timely delivery of cargo while complying with driving regulations.
day_to_day: Driving long distances to deliver goods
Following route plans and delivery schedules
Complying with driver hours and safety regulations
qualifications: Category C or C+E HGV licence
work_environment: On the road, distribution centres, warehouses; may involve nights out or long-distance travel.
